bullets: Chinese PP offers jump (Jinneng HP550J to 1,365) on maintenance and oil.
IRPC June PP -30 (homo 1,360 CFR HCMC) but still high.
Marubeni cut NSRP 114G to 34,500; Sibur homo/copo to 35,300-35,600.
BASF China HDPE to 1,240; Sabic-Tianjin 222WT to 1,220 (down 50).
US June PVC export offers ~100 lower to stimulate demand.

editorial.changedNote: A few PVC and PP items eased; TR144 up 500

summary: Chinese and ME suppliers cut PE offers across segments to spur sales in a falling market.
Domestic distributors dropped Russian, Chinese and ME PE, though gaps stayed wide.
Buyers largely rejected major suppliers, forcing re-bids on unsold inventory.
paras: BASF China HDPE Film, offered early-week at 1,300-1,310, finalized at 1,250, then cut another 10 to 1,240 on June 3; BASF FOB Nansha/Ningbo was only 1,200 (500-ton lots).
Sabic-Tianjin LLDPE 222WT fell from 1,270 to 1,220 (down 50). Petrochina 7042/7042N at 1,145, Daqing/Jilin 7042 at 1,135 (both down 35).
Lotte Titan offered July PE: 260GG/200GG 1,540 (down 60 vs last month), injection 300YY/coating 800YY 1,620 (down 80) - an early offer, possibly to sell ahead of further drops.
Borouge LDPE to 1,530; Oman LLDPE 1,180-1,190; US Dow HDPE injection 1,200 with few takers.

Domestic 7042 (Kunlun)/7050 (Yulong) at 34,400 (down 100-300); Baofeng coal-based 32,700; another distributor 33,400; Sabic-China/Sabic 222WJ both 36,500; ZPC 2426H/2420H 45,000, another seller 42,800. Qamar FD21HS/Sabic 218WJ 36,300-36,400 (down 500).

Sibur LLDPE 34,600 (down 700), mLLDPE 36,200 (down 2,000), HDPE Film 37,000 (down 800-1,000), HDPE blow 36,700 (down 300), HDPE injection 36,000 (down 1,000). Sabic LDPE 1,540, LLDPE 1,200-1,220, HDPE 1,320 finals seen high vs Chinese 1,135-1,145/1,240.

summary: Chinese suppliers raised PP or avoided Vietnam on maintenance shortages and rising oil.
Buyers were caught between global-price fears and very low domestic NSRP rates.
Distributors cut NSRP and Sibur goods to clear stock, contrasting Chinese hikes.
paras: With US-Iran talks stalled and oil at 94-97 USD/barrel, sentiment firmed. Dalian PP futures jumped ~35 in two days. China May PP output ~3.13M tons (+6.42% m/m, -9.05% y/y) amid maintenance.
Chinese suppliers barely offered PP early-week or raised sharply: Jinneng HP550J to 1,365 (vs 1,240-1,250 last week). They favored other markets as Vietnam ran the SEA low after NSRP bid 27,000 tons.
Buyers were confused - some wanting to restock before a possible rebound, others waiting for deeper cuts.
IRPC re-offered June PP/PS -30: homo to 1,360 CFR HCMC, 1126NK 1,450, 1100RC 1,400, B1101 1,490 (-20) - still high.
Sibur PP homo/non-woven/copo at 35,300-35,600 (down 1,000-1,100). Marubeni cut NSRP 114G to 34,500 (up to 500 below last-week lows).

Stavian offered BSR T3034 36,400, Jinneng HP550J 35,800, Lotte MP9600 49,000. Chinese copo K8003/K8009 39,800-40,000 (up from 38,800), non-woven Y40 40,500, yarn 1102K 38,900. Earlier China T03 34,500, copo K8003 38,000; BSR T3034 as low as 35,900; Hyosung F501 36,700.

summary: Global PVC stayed pressured on abundant supply and weak seasonal demand; US offers cut ~100.
Vietnam held Chinese coal-based at 22,000-22,300 while oil-based fell to 24,000.
Southern sellers undercut factory rates, finalizing domestic/Thai PVC at 24,000-24,500.
paras: Dalian PVC futures were mixed but broadly sideways. Weak supply-demand persisted; construction/real-estate demand stayed soft and India export prices fell.
The US PVC market faced downward pressure on low construction demand and ample supply; June export offers ran ~100 lower, though some sought a 4 cents/lb domestic hike against skepticism.
In Vietnam, Northern Chinese SG-5 (Xinfa) at 22,000 with transport, Yihua 22,300 - sideways. Southern Yihua SG-5 at 22,000; Chinese oil-based to 24,000.
Southern domestic/Thai SG660/SP660/PM66R finalized 24,000-24,500, below factory rates, on cautious pre-rainy-season sentiment.
